error_signature: There was a problem generating the authorization URL
title: Outlook OAuth2 Authorization URL Generation Error
symptom: When attempting to connect a Microsoft Outlook account, n8n displays 'There was a problem generating the authorization URL'. This occurs intermittently and seems to resolve without changes.
not_this_if: Error occurs consistently without any successful attempts
root_cause: The issue arises because the Outlook OAuth credential UI sometimes attempts to generate the authorization URL before the credential is fully saved. This leads to a failure in building the OAuth state, resulting in the error message.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to save and reopen the credential dialog before connecting your account.
